title: Dragonlight Router — Delta Spec (v0.3.0 Baseline)
description: Fresh delta-spec tracking deviations from the v0.3.0 live spec. Carries forward 4 items from the v0.2.0 cycle: SEC-006, TS-001, TS-002, SEC-003.

title: Admin API key defaults to None (open access)
detail: admin_api_key field in RouterConfig defaults to None. When not set, all admin endpoints (/v1/retire, /v1/reinstate, /v1/catalog/refresh) are accessible without authentication. Startup warning exists but no enforcement gate. Intentional for local development but production deployments MUST set admin_api_key.

title: Property-based test coverage gaps in cascade dispatch and health modules
detail: 23 @given Hypothesis tests cover scoring, budget, MBR, LBR, and interleave invariants. Cascade dispatch, health check loop, context filtering, and adapter error handling still lack PBT coverage.

title: Consumer-driven contract tests missing
detail: tests/acceptance/ has a full acceptance test suite (428+ lines). tests/contracts/ contains only __init__.py. Consumer-driven contract tests for the select and dispatch APIs are not implemented.

title: SSRF validation not wired into adapter dispatch path
detail: validate_provider_url() exists in core/validation.py and is wired into catalog/refresher.py. Adapter dispatch in _openai_compat.py still accepts unvalidated base URLs from BackendConfig. Risk: a compromised config could route adapter requests to internal services.
